scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run client" "npm run admin" "npm run backend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix client && npm run build --prefix admin && node scripts/post-build-commit.js
scripts.build:client: npm run build --prefix client && node scripts/post-build-commit.js
scripts.build:admin: npm run build --prefix admin && node scripts/post-build-commit.js
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix admin && npm install --prefix backend
scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix admin
